playbook.intent: Shipped MVP at $0 MRR → ramen-profitable $4K MRR / quit-day-job threshold without VC.
playbook.scope: Solo dev with shipped MVP grinds to ramen-profitable ($4K MRR / quit-day-job threshold) without VC. Combines a single-channel distribution flywheel, retention defense, and runway accounting until either MRR target hit or honest sunset. Exit artifact is a quit-day-job decision contract or written sunset note.

success-criteria.criterion: Single-channel acquisition bet chosen and documented
MRR dashboard live and reviewed weekly
$4K MRR reached OR documented sunset decision

stage.name: Pick channel
stage.intent: Choose one acquisition channel and commit for 90 days.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once channel is chosen. Refuse to advance with 'I'll try a few' — single bet only.

stage.name: Activate
stage.intent: Fix the signup-to-paid funnel before pouring traffic in.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when activation rate >40%. Stay if leaking.

stage.name: Retain
stage.intent: Defend revenue: churn prevention before growth.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when monthly net revenue churn <3%. Stay if revenue leaking faster than acquisition fills.

stage.name: Scale channel
stage.intent: Compound the chosen channel: loops, referrals, content velocity.

tasks.task: Build 1 growth loop on the chosen channel

stage.decision-gate: Advance when MoM growth >15% for 2 consecutive months.

stage.name: Price
stage.intent: Optimise pricing for revenue-per-customer not signups.
stage.decision-gate: Advance if price experiment improves revenue/customer ≥10% OR is conclusively rejected.

stage.name: Operate
stage.intent: Customer support + financial planning to sustain solo cadence.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when ops cadence is sustainable (no operator burnout).

stage.name: Decide

tasks.task: Write quit-day-job contract or sunset note

stage.decision-gate: Required output: written decision. $4K reached = quit-day-job. Plateau = sunset or pivot.

extra.value: [Multi-channel paid acquisition — single-channel bet only, Hiring or outsourcing — solo operator throughout]
[MVP live and processing real payments, At least 5 paying customers (Stage 6 of idea-to-validated-mvp complete)]
[Spreading across 4 channels because none works after a month — usually means 90 days hadn't passed, Treating $4K as quitting moment without runway buffer — keep 6 months runway in the contract]
['Did I actually commit to ONE channel, or did I just write that I would?', 'Is the MRR dashboard checked weekly, or only when I feel anxious?']
{human: faion get-content bootstrap-to-4k-mrr --format md, agent: faion get-content bootstrap-to-4k-mrr --format context, json: faion get-content bootstrap-to-4k-mrr --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
